globalblocking-desc: [[Special:GlobalBlock|Waxay oggolaanaysaa]] xisaabaadka, cinwaannada IP, iyo xaddidaadaha IP in laga [[Special:GlobalBlockList|xannibo wiki-yo badan]].
globalblocking-block-intro: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa boggan si aad uga xannibto isticmaale ama cinwaan IP dhammaan wikis-ka.
globalblocking-block-reason-dropdown:
* Sababaha xannibaadda ee guud
** Spam-ka wiki-yada kala duwan
** Xadgudubka wiki-yada kala duwan
** Burburin
globalblocking-target: Magaca isticmaale, cinwaanka IP, ama xadka IP:
globalblocking-target-with-block-ids: Magaca isticmaale, cinwaanka IP, xadka IP, ama aqoonsiga xannibaadda:
globalblocking-ipbanononly: Kaliya xannib isticmaaleyaasha aan la aqoonsan si caalami ah
globalblocking-block-disable-account-cre: Jooji abuurista xisaabaadka si caalami ah
globalblocking-block-block-email: Ka xannib isticmaalaha inuu diro iimayl si caalami ah
globalblocking-block-enable-autoblock: Si toos ah u xannib si caalami ah {{PLURAL:$1|cinwaanka IP-ga ugu dambeeyay|$1 cinwaan IP ee ugu dambeeyay}} ee uu isticmaalahan adeegsaday, iyo sidoo kale cinwaan kasta oo IP ah oo dambe oo ay isku dayaan inay wax ka beddelaan, muddo dhan $2.
globalblocking-block-target-invalid: Magaca isticmaalaha, cinwaanka IP-ga, ama xadka IP ($1) aad gelisay waa aan sax ahayn.
globalblocking-block-expiryinvalid: Waqtiga dhicitaanka aad gelisay sax ma ahan.
globalblocking-block-anononly-on-account: Xannibaadaha xisaabaadka laguma xaddidi karo kaliya isticmaaleyaasha aan la aqoonsan.
globalblocking-block-enable-autoblock-on: Xannibaadaha tooska ah waxaa kaliya loo oggolaan karaa xannibaadaha xisaabaadka.
globalblocking-block-modifying-global-au: Xannibaadaha tooska ah waa la kaliya laga qaadi karaa, lama beddeli karo.
globalblocking-modify-submit: Wax ka beddel xannibaaddan caalamiga ah
globalblocking-modify-success: Xannibaadda caalamiga ah ee '''$1''' waa la beddelay.
globalblocking-local-failed: Xannibaadda isticmaalaha si maxalli ah waa fashilantay maadaama isticmaalahan horeba looga xannibay wiki-kan.
globalblocking-block-failure: Khalad ayaa dhacay markii la isku dayayay in si caalami ah loo xannibo $1. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
globalblocking-block-alreadyblocked:
$1 hore ayaa si caalami ah loo xanibay.
Waxaad ka arki kartaa xannibaadda jirta [[Special:GlobalBlockList|liiska xannibaadaha caalamiga ah]],
ama waxaad wax ka beddeli kartaa dejimaha xannibaadda jirta adigoo mar kale gudbinaya foomkan.
globalblocking-bigrange:
Xadka aad sheegtay ($1) wuu ka weyn yahay xadka la oggol yahay.
Xadka $2 waa /$3.
globalblocking-also-local: Sidoo kale ku xannib isticmaalaha la siiyay si maxalli ah wiki-kan
globalblocking-also-local-talk: Ka xannib isticmaalaha inuu wax ka beddelo boggiisa wada hadalka si maxalli ah
globalblocking-also-local-email: Ka xannib isticmaalaha inuu diro iimayl si maxalli ah
globalblocking-also-local-soft: Kaliya xannib isticmaaleyaasha aan la aqoonsan si maxalli ah
globalblocking-also-local-disable-accoun: Jooji abuurista xisaabaadka si maxalli ah
globalblocklist-summary:
Tani waa liiska dhammaan xannibaadaha caalamiga ah ee hadda shaqaynaya.
Qaar ka mid ah xannibaadaha waxaa lagu calaamadeeyaa “si maxalli ah loo joojiyay”: taas waxay ka dhigan tahay inay ka shaqeeyaan goobaha kale, laakiin maamulaha wiki-ga ayaa go’aansaday in laga joojiyo wiki-kan. Xannibaadaha tooska ah ee caalamiga ah si otomaatig ah ayaa si maxalli ah loo joojiyaa haddii cinwaanka IP-ga bartilmaameedka uu ku jiro [[MediaWiki:Block-autoblock-exemptionlist]]. Haddii xannibaad toos ah si otomaatig ah loo joojiyo maxalli ahaan sababtoo ah IP-ga ku jira [[MediaWiki:Block-autoblock-exemptionlist]], arrintaas si guud looma shaaciyo.
globalblocking-list: Liiska cinwaannada IP-ga iyo xisaabaadka caalamiyan loo xannibay
globalblocking-list-target-invalid:
Isticmaalaha aad raadisay ($1) waa aan sax ahayn.
Fadlan geli cinwaan IP ama magac isticmaale oo sax ah.
globalblocking-list-locally-disabled-wit: si maxalli ah waa la joojiyay: $1
globalblocking-list-tempblocks: Qari xannibaadaha ku meel gaarka ah
globalblocking-list-tempaccountblocks: Qari xannibaadaha xisaabaadka ku meel gaarka ah
globalblocking-list-noresults: Natiijooyin lama helin iyadoo la adeegsanayo xuduudaha la bixiyay.
globalblocking-goto-status: Beddel xaaladda maxalliga ah ee xannibaad caalami ah
globalblocking-goto-mass-block: Xannib isticmaaleyaal badan si caalami ah
globalblocking-return: Ku laabo liiska xannibaadaha caalamiga ah
globalblocking-add-block: Ku dar xannibaad caalami ah oo kale
globalblocking-notblocked: Isticmaalaha ($1) aad gelisay si caalami ah looma xannibin.
globalblocking-notblocked-id: Ma jiro xannibaad caalami ah oo leh aqoonsiga $1.
globalblocking-unblock-unblocked: Waxaad ka saartay xannibaadda caalamiga ah ee saarnayd isticmaalaha '''$1'''.
globalblocking-unblock-unblocked-for-id-: Waxaad ka saartay xannibaadda caalamiga ah '''#$1'''.
globalblocking-unblock-intro: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa foomkan si aad uga saarto xannibaad caalami ah.
globalblocking-all-global-blocks-disable: Xannibaadaha caalamiga ah ma khuseeyaan wiki-kan
globalblocking-logpagetext:
Kani waa diiwaanka xannibaadaha caalamiga ah ee lagu sameeyay lagana qaaday wiki-kan.
Waa in la ogaadaa in xannibaadaha caalamiga ah laga samayn karo lagana qaadi karo wikis kale, isla markaana xannibaadahani ay saameyn ku yeelan karaan wiki-kan.
Si aad u aragto dhammaan xannibaadaha caalamiga ah ee firfircoon, waxaad eegi kartaa [[Special:GlobalBlockList|liiska xannibaadaha caalamiga ah]].
globalblocking-logentry-block: $1 {{GENDER:$2|si caalami ah ayaa loo xannibay}} {{GENDER:$4|$3}} oo leh wakhti dhicitaan $5 $6
globalblocking-logentry-modify: $1 {{GENDER:$2|beddelay}} dejimaha xannibaadda caalamiga ah ee {{GENDER:$4|$3}} oo leh wakhti dhicitaan $5 $6
globalblocking-block-flag-autoblock-disa: xannibaadda otomaatiga ah waa la joojiyay
globalblocking-loglink: Isticmaalaha $1 waa la xannibay caalami ahaan ([[{{#Special:GlobalBlockList}}/$1|faahfaahinta oo dhammaystiran]]).
globalblocking-contribs-notice:
Isticmaalahani hadda waa mid caalami ahaan la xannibay.
Gelitaanka diiwaanka xannibaadda caalamiga ah ayaa hoos ku qoran si loo tixraaco:
globalblocking-contribs-mock-log-line: $1: $3 si caalami ah ayaa {{GENDER:$2|loo xannibay}} {{GENDER:$4|$5}} oo leh wakhti dhicitaan $6 $7 $8 $9
globalblocking-showlog:
Isticmaalahaan hore ayaa loo xannibay.  
Diiwaanka xannibaadda ayaa hoos lagu soo bandhigay tixraac ahaan:
globalblocking-contribs-modify: wax ka beddel xannibaadda caalamiga ah
globalblocking-mass-block-legend: Si caalami ah u xannib ama ka qaad xannibaadda bartilmaameedyo badan
globalblocking-mass-block-block: Si caalami ah u xannib bartilmaameedyada la xushay
globalblocking-mass-block-unblock: Ka saar xannibaadda bartilmaameedyada la doortay si caalami ah
globalblocking-mass-block-bot: Ku calaamadee gelitaannada [[{{#special:RecentChanges}}|{{int:recentchanges}}]] sidii gelitaanno bot.
globalblocking-mass-block-header-status: Si caalami ah ayaa loo xannibay
globalblocking-mass-block-failure-block: Ku guuldareystay in si caalami ah loo xannibo $1
globalblocking-mass-block-failure-local: Ku guuldareystay in si maxalli ah loo xannibo $1
globalblocking-mass-block-failure-unbloc: Ku guuldareystay in si caalami ah looga qaado xannibaadda $1
globalblocking-mass-block-success-block: Si guul leh ayaa si caalami ah loo xannibay $1
globalblocking-mass-block-success-local: Si guul leh ayaa si maxalli ah loo xannibay $1
globalblocking-mass-block-success-unbloc: Si guul leh ayaa si caalami ah looga qaaday xannibaadda $1
globalblocking-mass-block-token-mismatch: Waan ka xunnahay, ma awoodin inaan farsameyno gudbinta foomkaaga sababtoo ah xogta fadhiga  ayaa luntay.
globalblocking-mass-block-too-many-targe: Waxaad hal mar xannibi kartaa oo kaliya $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bartilmaameed|bartilmaameedyo}}. Fadlan isku day inaad ka saarto qaar ka mid ah bartilmaameedyada si aad ugu xannibto qaybo.

Waxaad hal mar ka saari kartaa xannibaadda oo kaliya $1 {{PLURAL:$1|bartilmaameed|bartilmaameedyo}}. Fadlan isku day inaad ka saarto xulashada qaar ka mid ah bartilmaameedyada si aad uga qaaddo xannibaadda qayb-qayb.
globalblocking-mass-block-query-legend: Raadi bartilmaameedyo si caalami ah loo xannibo ama looga qaado xannibaadda
globalblocking-mass-block-query-placehol: Geli hal ama in ka badan oo cinwaanno IP ah, xadadka IP-ga, xisaabaadka, ama aqoonsiyada xannibaadda caalamiga ah. Mid kasta ku kala saar khad cusub.
massglobalblock-summary: Waxaad isticmaali kartaa boggan si aad u xannibto isticmaaleyaal badan iyo/ama cinwaanno IP ah dhammaan wiki-yada.
globalblocklist: Liiska isticmaaleyaasha si caalami ah loo xannibay
globalblockstatus: Xaaladda maxalliga ah ee xannibaadaha caalamiga ah
massglobalblock: Xannib isticmaaleyaal badan si caalami ah
right-globalblock: Samee oo ka saar xannibaadaha caalamiga ah
action-globalblock: Samee oo ka saar xannibaadaha caalamiga ah
right-globalblock-whitelist: Si maxalli ah u jooji xannibaadaha caalamiga ah
action-globalblock-whitelist: Si maxalli ah u jooji xannibaadaha caalamiga ah
right-globalblock-exempt: Ka gudub xannibaadaha IP-ga caalamiga ah
action-globalblock-exempt: Ka gudub xannibaadaha IP-ga caalamiga ah
log-action-filter-gblblock-modify: Wax ka beddel xannibaadda caalamiga ah
log-action-filter-gblblock-whitelist: Ku darista liiska caddaanka ee xannibaadda caalamiga ah
log-action-filter-gblblock-dwhitelist: Ka saarista liiska caddaanka ee xannibaadda caalamiga ah
grant-globalblock: Xannib ama ka saar xannibaadda isticmaalaha si caalami ah
globalblocking-blockedtext-all-wikis: Cinwaankaaga IP-ga waa laga xannibay dhammaan wiki-yada.
globalblocking-blockedtext-on-range: Cinwaankaaga IP-ga wuxuu ku jiraa xad la xannibay dhammaan wikis-ka.
globalblocking-blockedtext-on-proxy: Hal ama dhowr adeeg oo proxy ah oo uu isticmaalay codsigaaga waa laga xannibay si caalami ah.
globalblocking-blockedtext-on-user: Xisaabtaada waa laga xannibay dhammaan wiki-yada.
globalblocking-blockedtext-autoblock-int: Cinwaankaaga IP-ga si otomaatig ah ayaa caalami ahaan loo xannibay sababtoo ah waxaa isticmaalay isticmaale kale oo uu xannibay $1.
Hal ama dhowr server oo proxy ah oo uu isticmaalay codsigaaga si otomaatig ah ayaa caalami ahaan loo xannibay sababtoo ah waxaa isticmaalay isticmaale kale oo uu xannibay $1.
globalblocking-blockedtext-blocker-admin: Waxaad la xiriiri kartaa $1 si aad ugala hadasho xannibaadda.
globalblocking-blockedtext-email-feature: Ma isticmaali kartid astaanta "{{int:emailuser}}" ilaa aad ku darto ciwaan email sax ah oo ku jira [[Special:Preferences|xulashooyinka akoonkaaga]] oo aan lagaa xannibin isticmaalkeeda.
globalblocking-blockedtext-proxy: Cinwaanka proxy-ga ee la xannibay wuxuu ahaa $1.
globalblocking-autoblocker:
Si otomaatig ah ayaa caalami ahaan lagugu xannibay sababtoo ah cinwaankaaga IP-ga waxaa dhowaan isticmaalay "[[User:$1|$1]]".
Sababta loo bixiyay xannibaadda $1 waa "$2"
globalblocking-autoblocker-hidden-block: Si otomaatig ah ayaa caalami ahaan lagugu xannibay sababtoo ah cinwaankaaga IP-ga waxaa dhowaan isticmaalay isticmaale lagu xannibay aqoonsiga xannibaadda #$1.
globalblocking-global-autoblock-id: Xannibaad otomaatig ah oo caalami ah #$1
